title: ws_backoff_idx not reset when WS recovers after partial failure
description: SSE resets sse_backoff_idx=0 in the StateChange arm when a successful event arrives (line 378). WS never resets ws_backoff_idx when TypingIndicator or PresenceUpdate arrives. Scenario: 3 WS failures (backoff_idx=3 → 8s next), then a TypingIndicator arrives (ws_consecutive_failures=0 but ws_backoff_idx stays at 3), then connection drops — next reconnect waits 8s instead of 1s. UX-visible regression: a recently-healthy WS takes unnecessarily long to reconnect. Fix: add ws_backoff_idx = 0; in both TypingIndicator and PresenceUpdate reset arms, mirroring the SSE pattern.
